title: intrachromosomal_co_effect_v1 — per-chrom Welch's t on CO_per_mb (het vs non-het)
description: Typed result of the `intrachromosomal_co_karyotype_effect` chain. One row per tested chromosome; chromosomes with <2 dyads in either karyotype bucket are emitted with null statistics and excluded_reason='insufficient_dyads'. Backs meiosis_atlas chain product intrachromosomal_co_effect.

per_chrom.description: One row per chromosome present in the karyotype-stratified events envelope.

rate_ratio_het_over_non_het.description: mean_het / mean_non_het. null when non-het mean is 0 or either group has <2 dyads.

welch_t.description: Welch's t statistic. null on degenerate input.

p_two_sided.description: Two-sided p from Student's t CDF (hand-rolled via incomplete beta).

flag_below_threshold.description: true iff rate_ratio_het_over_non_het < flag_threshold (manuscript suppression heuristic).

excluded_reason.description: Present only when statistics are null (e.g. 'insufficient_dyads').

n_chroms_tested.description: Chromosomes that had >=2 dyads in each karyotype bucket.

n_chroms_excluded.description: Chromosomes with too few dyads to test.

n_chroms_flagged.description: Tested chromosomes whose rate_ratio_het_over_non_het was below flag_threshold.
